_source: Research brief 3 §Dynamic Macronutrient Partitioning + Module 3. The 5 product modes with macro splits (fraction of kcal) + LBM protein floor (g/kg) + engine query rules.

diet_modes.label: Full Healthy
diet_modes.basis: Whole-food clean baseline; fiber & MUFA/PUFA emphasis (Mediterranean-informed).

diet_modes.label: Junk Food Allowed (IIFYM)
diet_modes.basis: Flexible dieting — any food passes if protein+fiber floors and kcal ceiling hold.

diet_modes.label: Aggressive Recomp
diet_modes.basis: High-protein, adaptive surplus/deficit; TEF-leveraged. Uses InBody LBM for protein floor.

diet_modes.label: Therapeutic / Recovery
diet_modes.basis: Anti-inflammatory / joint / digestion focus. Wellness framing only — no treatment claims.
